---
name: Research work item
about: Track a targeted research task linked to a PM idea
title: "[research]: "
labels: 'research'
assignees: ''
---

## Linked PM Idea
Reference the pm-idea issue number.

## Research Objective
What question must this research answer?

## Target Persona or Segment
Who should be studied?

## Method
Interviews, analytics review, survey, benchmark, etc.

## Required Outputs
What artifact must be produced and where it should be stored.

## Definition of Done
Checklist of completion criteria.

- [ ] Findings documented
- [ ] Confidence level assigned
- [ ] Evidence links included
- [ ] Issue closed with summary comment
